best_variant.label: Substrate positioning tunnel

gate residue to increase retention near the catalyst

variant_set.label: Substrate positioning tunnel
variant_set.description: Engineer a tunnel and gate to orient target C-H toward the reactive center.

gate residue to increase retention near the catalyst

variant_set.rationale: Positioning dominates for small substrates; channel engineering reduces entropic penalty.
variant_set.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
variant_set.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization

mutations.note: tight hydrophobic cage around radical intermediate

compare_to.rationale: A compact cage reduces radical diffusion and improves rebound probability.
compare_to.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
compare_to.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization
mechanism mismatch penalty applied to barrier

arms.why: Directly compare top variants under identical conditions.

candidate.label: Substrate positioning tunnel
candidate.description: Engineer a tunnel and gate to orient target C-H toward the reactive center.

mutations.note: hydrophobic channel lining for small gas-like substrates
gate residue to increase retention near the catalyst

candidate.rationale: Positioning dominates for small substrates; channel engineering reduces entropic penalty.
candidate.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
candidate.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization
mechanism mismatch penalty applied to barrier

veto_rules: Abort if negative control shows >5% conversion.

variance_rules: Repeat any arm with >20% replicate variance.
Flag arms with inconsistent pH drift (>0.3).
